title: AXNotificationContentType
description: Union type defining the allowed content types for notification content.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Union type definition for notification content types.

data.content: export type AXNotificationContentType = string | TemplateRef<unknown> | ComponentType<unknown>;

props.name: AXNotificationContentType
props.description: Union type defining the allowed content types for notification content. Can be a string for simple text, a template reference for custom HTML, or a component type for dynamic content.
